index.title: Check for Stroke Signs
index.subtitle: Face · Arm · Speech
index.emergency: Suspect stroke? Don’t wait for the result. Contact local emergency services now.
index.notDiagnosis: Preliminary screening only · Not a diagnosis
index.invalid: Unable to assess · Tap to retry
index.newPersonBody: The current results will be cleared and a new screening session will be created.

disclaimer.title: Important information before use
disclaimer.body: QuickStroke is for preliminary screening only. It is not a medical diagnosis, and a result with no abnormal sign detected does not rule out stroke.
disclaimer.emergency: If you suspect stroke, do not wait for the result. Contact local emergency services immediately.

face.noFace: ⚠️ No face detected — center your face in the frame
face.step1: Step 1: Keep your face straight and relaxed
face.noFaceBaseline: ⚠️ No face detected during baseline. Please try again.
face.mouthNotAssessable: ⚠️ Unable to assess — keep your mouth clearly visible and smile widely
face.retrying: 😐 No clear smile yet — retrying automatically
face.invalidHelp: ⚠️ Could not assess after several tries — ask staff for help, or tap ↺
face.tiltLeft: ↙️ Head tilted — keep your head straight
face.tiltRight: ↘️ Head tilted — keep your head straight
face.lookUp: ⬇️ Looking down — lift your head slightly
face.lookDown: ⬆️ Looking up — lower your head slightly
face.critical:
🚨 Severe asymmetry detected!
Seek medical attention immediately
face.restVoice: Keep your face straight and still
face.cameraErr: ⚠️ Cannot access the camera. Please allow camera access.
face.modelErr: ❌ Failed to load face detection. Check your connection and try again.

arm.sensorDenied: Motion access denied. Please allow in Settings and refresh.
arm.sensorUnsupported: Motion sensor not supported on this device.
arm.subWait_right: Keep the arm straight · screen faces left
arm.subWait_left: Keep the arm straight · screen faces right
arm.subMeasure: Keep your arm and wrist straight
arm.warnFlatSub: Keep the top of the phone up; side direction is not sensor-verified
arm.finalOkSub: No significant phone-angle change consistent with arm drift was detected.
arm.finalBadSub: The movement pattern may be consistent with arm drift. Seek urgent medical assessment if stroke is suspected.
arm.vWait_right: Extend your right arm. Screen faces left. Hold still.
arm.vWait_left: Now extend your left arm. Screen faces right. Hold still.
arm.vCalibRetry: Hold as still as you can.
arm.vFlat: Hold the phone upright with the top facing up.
arm.subRetryWrist: Keep the wrist straight and repeat this arm.
arm.subRetryUncertain: Repeat this arm while keeping the wrist straight.
arm.vRetryWrist: Your wrist moved. Please repeat this arm with the wrist straight.
arm.vRetryUncertain: The movement was unclear. Please repeat this arm.
arm.vFinalBad: Drift detected. Please see a doctor soon.
arm.guideNote: Arm straight · elbow straight · keep still

speech.hint: Press the button, wait for the signal, then speak clearly.
speech.noiseDesc: This room is noisy, results may be inaccurate.
speech.noisyTag: ⚠ SNR below 10 dB; background noise may affect the result
speech.subBad: Speech abnormality detected; seek medical help
speech.voiceButNoText: Voice detected, but not recognized in the selected language
speech.deadMicFailed: ⚠️ Microphone is not responding. Please wait a moment and start again.

result.individualNoDataDesc: No result is available for this check
result.individualInvalidDesc: This check could not be assessed
result.individualOkDesc: No sign was detected in this check
result.individualReviewDesc: This check found a sign that needs review
result.individualUrgentDesc: This check found an abnormal sign
result.individualNotCombined: This is a single-check result, not the combined 3-sign result
result.stateOkDesc: This result does not rule out stroke
result.nextNoData: Begin with Face, then complete all checks
result.nextOk: Still have symptoms or suspect stroke? Do not wait
result.nextReview: If symptoms began suddenly, contact emergency services
result.nextUrgent: Note the symptom start time and do not drive yourself
result.safetyNote: Preliminary screening only · Not a diagnosis
result.retryConfirm: Clear all results and restart the screening?
result.emergencyReminderThailand: Still suspect stroke? Do not wait
result.emergencyReminderLocal: Still suspect stroke? Contact local emergency services
result.technicalDisclaimer: Internal scores are for system analysis only. They are not a risk percentage or diagnosis.

permissions.needCamera: This step needs your camera to check facial symmetry.
permissions.needMic: This step needs your microphone to check speech.
permissions.privacyNote: QuickStroke processes camera and microphone data on this device only.
permissions.blockedCamera: Camera access is blocked. Please enable camera permission.
permissions.blockedMic: Microphone access is blocked. Please enable microphone permission.
permissions.notFoundCamera: No camera found on this device.
permissions.notFoundMic: No microphone found on this device.
permissions.inUse: The device is being used by another app. Close it and try again.
permissions.insecure: This page must be opened over HTTPS.
iosSafari: Tap the “aA” icon in the address bar.
Enable Camera or Microphone, then reload the page.
androidChrome: Tap the site controls icon next to the web address.
Enable Camera or Microphone, then reload the page.
desktop: Click the site controls icon next to the web address.
permissions.loadError: Unable to load language resources. Please reload the page.
